item.title: West Virginia Hot Dog Challenge
item.description: The 2nd Best West Virginia Hot Dog didn't last long in this fun food challenge. A simple, flavorful bite with plenty of local flavor.

media:content.media:title: West Virginia Hot Dog Challenge
media:content.media:description: The 2nd Best West Virginia Hot Dog didn't last long in this fun food challenge. A simple, flavorful bite with plenty of local flavor.

item.title: The $500 Electric Chair Challenge!
item.description: A spicy challenge at Selina's Bar & Grill in Houston, MS, featuring the $500 Electric Chair Challenge.

media:content.media:title: The $500 Electric Chair Challenge!
media:content.media:description: A spicy challenge at Selina's Bar & Grill in Houston, MS, featuring the $500 Electric Chair Challenge.

item.title: Undefeated 75oz Steak Challenge
item.description: Big steak, big pressure — would you back me in this one?

media:content.media:description: Big steak, big pressure — would you back me in this one?

item.title: Pizza Challenge: One Bet, One Clock
item.description: One bet, one clock, and a whole lot of pizza pressure in this timed food challenge.

media:content.media:title: Pizza Challenge: One Bet, One Clock
media:content.media:description: One bet, one clock, and a whole lot of pizza pressure in this timed food challenge.

item.title: 5Lb Burger Challenge in 30 Minutes
item.description: A massive burger challenge with a huge patty and a 30-minute time limit. Fun, flavorful, and built for a big appetite.

media:content.media:title: 5Lb Burger Challenge in 30 Minutes
media:content.media:description: A massive burger challenge with a huge patty and a 30-minute time limit. Fun, flavorful, and built for a big appetite.

item.title: Blue Ash Chili Challenge
item.description: One mountain of chili, one shot at victory, and zero room for excuses.

media:content.media:description: One mountain of chili, one shot at victory, and zero room for excuses.
